raw: This pass admits up to 2 adults and 2 children at 1/2 price. This is a coupon pass and doesn't need to be returned to the Library. You may pick up this pass from the Library up to 1 week in advance. You save by using this pass! Admission without this pass is: Adults: $24.00 Senior: $18.00 Child (ages 2+): $18.00 Children under 2: Free Purchased by the TPL using funding from the State Aid to Public Library program administered by the MA Board of Library Commissioners.
